ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "cm" REAL /* Size in centimeters */,
  "english" REAL /* English size */,
  "continental" REAL /* Continental size */,
  "american" REAL /* American size */,
  "japanese" REAL /* Japanese size */,
  "size_chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing type (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Women's Tops) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "body_measurements" TEXT /* Body measurements of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer support agent, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of size chart (e.g., bust, waist, hip)
Human-readable name for the size (e.g., Small, Medium)
Unique identifier for each clothing type
Category of the clothing type (e.g., Casual, Formal)
Unique identifier for each size chart
Name of the size chart (e.g., Women's Tops)
Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered)
Role of the user (e.g., customer support agent, data analyst, admin)
